CustomField.formula: IF( ISNULL(BAC_Approval_Date__c), "No Date Provided - " & IMAGE("/resource/1719316089000/GraphicsPackNew/fatcow/farmfresh/16/exclamation.png", "No Date Provided"), IF( BAC_Approval_Date__c <= TODAY(), TEXT(DAY(BAC_Approval_Date__c)) & "/" & TEXT(MONTH(BAC_Approval_Date__c)) & "/" & TEXT(YEAR(BAC_Approval_Date__c)) & " " & IMAGE("/resource/1719316089000/GraphicsPackNew/fatcow/farmfresh/16/tick.png", "Approved"), TEXT(DAY(BAC_Approval_Date__c)) & "/" & TEXT(MONTH(BAC_Approval_Date__c)) & "/" & TEXT(YEAR(BAC_Approval_Date__c)) & " " & IMAGE("/resource/1719316089000/GraphicsPackNew/fatcow/farmfresh/16/exclamation.png", "Pending Approval") ) )
CustomField.label: Expected BAC Approval Date
